description: A central theme, motif, or underlying idea explored in a literary work.

name.description: The name of the theme, e.g. 爱, 自由, 科技与人, 成长

description.description: An explanation of what this theme encompasses

related_themes.description: Thematically connected or frequently paired concepts

works.description: Example works that prominently feature this theme

significance.description: The thematic importance or cultural relevance of this motif
